aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite JR Heating & Cooling due to missing key schema markup and a lack of conversational content that aligns with AI query patterns.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema to capture common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive or not utilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC services in Bronx' and 'HVAC compliance solutions'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to capture immediate AI attention.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the expert in government and industrial HVAC by creating content around compliance, certifications, and technical expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the new search landscape.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Google Bard.
agency_pitch.proof_point: No schema markup or conversational content to capture AI-driven queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates strategic schema implementation, authority-building content, and AI query alignment to ensure your business is cited and recommended by AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—waiting means losing ground and market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for JR Heating & Cooling
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven growth.
page_title: HVAC Services for Government & Industrial Facilities | JR Heating & Cooling
